Live & Results
Match Centre
Real results from the football-data.org API. Finished matches are locked into the simulation — every projection, group standing, knockout odd and award on this site is conditioned on them.
Tournament Projections
Full Probability Table
Every team’s chance at each stage across 10,000 simulations. Cells are colour-graded by probability — click any column header to rank by it.
Group Stage
Group Stage Predictions
Colour-graded finish & advancement probabilities for all 12 groups — top 2 advance automatically, plus 8 best 3rd-place finishers. Greener = more likely.
Knockout Stage
Predicted Knockout Bracket
Every slot filled by advancing the model’s favourite from the predicted group standings — percentages show the winner’s chance in that specific matchup
← scroll horizontally to explore the full bracket →
Squad Database
Player Explorer
All 1,248 players from the 48 squads. Current-season club stats (2025-26, Understat) — goals, assists, xG, xA & a form rating — alongside international tournament xG. Search, filter by position, click any column to sort, click a row for the full profile.
Individual Awards
Player & Award Predictions
Ranked by current-season club xG (2025-26, Understat) for squad players in Europe’s big-5 leagues, with historical tournament xG as fallback — weighted by team title probability
Recent club form × recent tournament form × projected run
Golden Ball Race — Predicted Best Player
A forecast, not a goal tally. Blends each player’s 2025-26 club goal involvements (xG+xA & actual G+A per 90), their recent national-team output, and how deep their team is projected to go — since the award almost always follows a deep run. Win share shown on the right.
Best XI · 4-3-3
Team of the Tournament
A projected best XI in a 4-3-3. Attackers & midfielders are ranked on club goal involvements per 90 × minutes × projected run; goalkeepers & defenders on their team’s projected defensive solidity (xG conceded/game) × minutes × run — since the best defenders come from the meanest, deepest-running sides. Updates as results condition the simulation.
Expected Goals
Top Predicted Scorers
Season xG × projected deep run

Defensive Ranking
Best Defensive Teams
How the forecast is built & how it's tested
Model & Validation
The match engine is an ensemble of three goal models, evaluated out-of-sample on every international since 2022. Below: head-to-head accuracy & calibration, the ensemble blend, and a backtest of the Golden Ball model on the 2022 World Cup.
Out-of-sample holdout
Model Comparison
Lower log-loss / Brier / ECE = better. Brier = mean squared probability error; ECE = expected calibration error (gap between confidence and accuracy).
Reliability — predicted vs actual
Calibration Curve
Home-win probability, binned. Points on the dashed diagonal = perfectly calibrated (a 30%-predicted bucket happens ~30% of the time).
The match engine
Ensemble Composition
Does the Golden Ball model work?
Backtest — 2022 World Cup
